text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki and I are watching the Arima
Kinen. Oguri Cap is as popular as ever, but there
are rumors that something's been off with her
recently.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even after stepping onto the track, Oguri Cap
doesn't raise her head once. Yaeno Muteki
attempts to talk some sense into her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap receives her strength from her
supporters. That's why she has to pick her head
up and feel their support. Hearing this, Oguri Cap
is reinvigorated.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, Yaeno Muteki commends Oguri
Cap for her recovery.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap expresses her gratitude and reveals
that next time, she wants to race against Yaeno
Muteki.
